title: helianthemum almeriense subsp. scopulorum
intro: Helianthemum almeriense subsp. scopulorum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Helianthemum almeriense subsp. scopulorum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
